multilinguals.description: Identifikator für die Medikationsverabreichung

multilinguals.shortDescription: The authoring system does not know which of the status values currently applies for this request. Note: This concept is not to be used for 'other' - one of the listed statuses is presumed to apply, it's just not known which one.
multilinguals.name: Unknown
multilinguals.description: The authoring system does not know which of the status values currently applies for this request. Note: This concept is not to be used for 'other' - one of the listed statuses is presumed to apply, it's just not known which one.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Includes administrations in an inpatient or acute care setting
multilinguals.name: Inpatient
multilinguals.description: Includes administrations in an inpatient or acute care setting

multilinguals.shortDescription: No reason known.
multilinguals.name: None
multilinguals.description: No reason known.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Zusätzliche Informationen zur Medikationsverabreichung als Freitext.

multilinguals.description: Zusätzliche Informationen zur Medikationsverabreichung als Freitext.

multilinguals.shortDescription:
Free text dosage can be used for cases where the dosage administered is too complex to code. When coded dosage is present, the free text dosage may still be present for display to humans.

The dosage instructions should reflect the dosage of the medication that was administered.
multilinguals.name: MedicationAdministration.dosage.text
multilinguals.description:
Free text dosage can be used for cases where the dosage administered is too complex to code. When coded dosage is present, the free text dosage may still be present for display to humans.

The dosage instructions should reflect the dosage of the medication that was administered.

multilinguals.shortDescription: A human-readable form of the unit.

multilinguals.description: A human-readable form of the unit.

multilinguals.shortDescription: The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency. The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.
multilinguals.name: MedicationAdministration.dosage.rate[x]:rateRatio.numerator.code
multilinguals.description: The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency. The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

multilinguals.shortDescription: The value of the measured amount. The value includes an implicit precision in the presentation of the value.
